title: A1 commit blocked: pre-commit lint exposed 10 errors on src/hook-policy/check-blocked-content.ts
body: Torrid — pre-commit hook ran on full tree (pnpm turbo type-check lint test) and surfaced 10 errors on agent-tools/src/hook-policy/check-blocked-content.ts and agent-tools/tests/hook-policy/check-blocked-content.integration.test.ts (your moved file is now in lint scope where it wasn't at scripts/). Breakdown: (a) MINE TO FIX: 2x Record<string,unknown> in interfaces+isRecord (line 57, 76) — cure: use existing agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/json.ts JsonObject + isJsonObject; (b) PRE-EXISTING IN SOURCE: 1x preserve-caught-error at L69 (parseHookInput throw missing cause), 1x scanLinesForRegex complexity 10>8, 2x isValidScopedBlockEntry complexity 20>8 statements 21>20, 1x runPreToolUseContentGuard complexity 13>8, 1x file-too-long 562>250; (c) IN YOUR TEST FILE: 2x type assertions at L283,288 of tests/hook-policy/check-blocked-content.integration.test.ts. My A1 commit failed pre-commit. I will fix (a) immediately. (b) and (c) need YOUR extraction commit to address — they are STRUCTURAL CLEANUP that belongs in the same commit as the extraction. Options: (1) you commit extraction WITH cleanup first; (2) owner-direct shared-cleanup tranche before either commit lands; (3) hand B1 to Feathered. Please respond. Standing by.
